task_completion.description: Agent accesses the PatientConnector project directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal showing navigation to /home/ga/eclipse-workspace/PatientConnector, or an IDE (like Eclipse or VS Code) with the PatientConnector project open in the file explorer.

task_completion.description: Agent targets the SSN pattern for search or replacement.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A search/replace dialog in an IDE or a terminal command (e.g., sed, grep, find) containing a regex for SSNs (e.g., \b\d{3}-\d{2}-\d{4}\b or [0-9]{3}-[0-9]{2}-[0-9]{4}).

task_completion.description: Agent applies the replacement string for SSNs.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Execution of a replace-all action in an IDE, a terminal command executing the replacement (e.g., sed -i), or a diff/file view showing real SSNs replaced by the exact string 'XXX-XX-XXXX'.

task_completion.description: Agent targets the MRN pattern for search or replacement.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A search/replace dialog in an IDE or a terminal command containing a regex for MRNs (e.g., MRN-\d{6} or MRN-[0-9]{6}).

task_completion.description: Agent applies the replacement string for MRNs.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Execution of a replace-all action in an IDE, a terminal command executing the replacement, or a diff/file view showing real MRNs replaced by the exact string 'MRN-000000'.

task_completion.description: Agent ensures all modified files are saved or modified in place.
task_completion.visual_evidence: IDE showing files are saved (no unsaved indicators), terminal output showing successful execution of in-place modification commands, or a git status/diff showing the files were modified.

integrity.description: Agent modifies the files in the correct PatientConnector project directory.
integrity.visual_evidence: File paths in the IDE or terminal commands must point to /home/ga/eclipse-workspace/PatientConnector or its subdirectories, not a dummy or copied folder.

integrity.description: Agent uses bulk replacement or regex rather than manual edits.
integrity.visual_evidence: Presence of regex patterns in search/replace fields or terminal commands, rather than manual cursor movements and typing over individual PII instances.

integrity.description: Agent redacts the files without deleting them.
integrity.visual_evidence: No commands like 'rm' used on the source files, and the IDE file explorer still shows the Java, XML, properties, and log files intact.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The project is located at /home/ga/eclipse-workspace/PatientConnector. There are exactly 15 SSNs matching the pattern \b\d{3}-\d{2}-\d{4}\b and 10 MRNs matching MRN-\d{6}. The replacement strings must be exactly 'XXX-XX-XXXX' for SSNs and 'MRN-000000' for MRNs. The agent should modify the files in place across Java, XML, properties, and log files.
